title: To establish a pilot program for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection at land ports of entry along the Arizona border to assess the use of artificial intelligence through an anomaly detection algorithm, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Homeland Security.
summary: A U.S. government pilot program is being established to test the use of artificial intelligence at Arizona's land border crossings. The program will assess an anomaly detection algorithm to identify potential issues.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 aims to regulate the environmental effects of artificial intelligence systems. The act is intended to mitigate potential harm caused by AI on the environment, although specific measures are not provided in the title.

title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
action: Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee (Amended) by Voice Vote.
summary: The Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act aims to alleviate the financial burden of energy costs associated with AI data centers on families. This Act seeks to protect families by addressing rising energy costs generated by AI data center operations.

title: To require artificial intelligence chatbot providers to provide data privacy and security, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: This policy aims to establish requirements for artificial intelligence chatbot providers to protect users' data and keep it secure. It likely includes measures to ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and privacy of user information handled by these chatbots.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 aims to address the impact of aging on society in the context of rapidly developing artificial intelligence. This legislation likely seeks to provide guidance and regulations on the use of AI to support or improve aging populations, potentially addressing areas such as healthcare, accessibility, and quality of life.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at addressing how aging populations interact with and are impacted by artificial intelligence. The exact goals and details of the policy are not specified.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 619.
summary: This act aims to promote innovation in the use of AI in financial services by creating a supportive environment for its development and implementation. It likely intends to facilitate the growth of AI-driven technologies in the financial industry while ensuring appropriate oversight and responsibility.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.
summary: The Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act aims to promote and regulate the use of artificial intelligence in the financial sector. This policy seeks to balance innovation with the need for security, transparency, and accountability in AI-driven financial services.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act is a policy intended to safeguard consumers from misleading or fake AI-generated content. Its purpose likely involves creating regulations to prevent the spread of deceptive AI information.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: The Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act aims to evaluate and mitigate potential risks posed by generative AI technologies. This act likely seeks to address concerns about how AI could be used for malicious purposes and ensure the safety of society.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to require the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to establish a prize competition program relating to artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy aims to amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to establish a prize competition program focused on artificial intelligence. The goal is to support innovation and advancements in AI.

title: Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026 aims to regulate and manage the risks associated with artificial intelligence. This act presumably establishes guidelines for responsible AI development and deployment at the federal level.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: This policy document likely assesses the risk of generative AI being used for terrorist purposes. It may outline steps to mitigate or prevent potential security threats related to AI-generated content.

title: NSF AI Education Act of 2025

summary: The NSF AI Education Act of 2025 is a policy document likely aimed at supporting education and research in the field of artificial intelligence through funding from the National Science Foundation.

title: LIFT AI Act

summary: The LIFT AI Act is a proposed policy that aims to improve artificial intelligence in some way, but the exact details are not specified. The title suggests it may be focused on lifting or enhancing AI capabilities, although further information is needed to confirm its specifics.

summary: The READ AI Models Act appears to be legislation governing the use of artificial intelligence models, requiring them to meet certain standards or requirements, but the specific details are unavailable.

title: CREATE AI Act of 2025

summary: The CREATE AI Act of 2025 is a law that aims to regulate and supervise the creation of advanced artificial intelligence technology. title: Workforce for AI Trust Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Workforce for AI Trust Act aims to address and improve the workforce's trust and understanding of artificial intelligence.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act is a policy that likely imposes a temporary halt on the construction of artificial intelligence data centers. The exact details and purpose of the moratorium are not specified in the title or available description.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: This policy document, the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act, likely puts a temporary pause or ban on the construction or operation of data centers for artificial intelligence in certain areas, possibly aiming to regulate its growth. The exact goals and specifics are unclear without more information.

title: Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act aims to promote transparency by requiring companies to inform consumers when artificial intelligence technology is being used to make decisions that affect them. This policy would likely involve businesses disclosing the use of AI in various areas of their operations.

title: SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026

summary: This document outlines a law called the SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026, which is likely related to the Small Business Administration (SBA) and its use or regulation of artificial intelligence.

title: Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026

summary: The Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026 is a proposed policy aimed at overseeing and regulating the development and use of artificial intelligence in a responsible and safe manner. The policy likely aims to protect the public and national interests by setting standards for AI development and deployment.

title: Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act

summary: This policy document outlines a law that uses AI to assess and track heat emergencies. The Act would likely aim to provide more accurate and efficient heat emergency management through the use of artificial intelligence and data tracking.

title: Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act aims to support and empower small AI innovators in their development and growth. The specifics of the policy are not available, but the title suggests its main focus is on providing assistance to small AI companies.

title: Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026

summary: The Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026 is a law aimed at protecting the integrity of elections by regulating the use of artificial intelligence in the electoral process. This act likely aims to prevent the misuse of AI for election manipulation, fraud, or other malicious activities.

title: Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
summary: The Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence Act is a government policy aimed at overseeing and regulating the development of advanced technologies and artificial intelligence. Its purpose is likely to ensure the safe and responsible application of these advancements in society.

title: American Leadership in AI Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committees on Energy and Commerce, Agriculture, Oversight and Government Reform, Education and Workforce, the Judiciary, and Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary:
The American Leadership in AI Act is a policy document aimed at guiding AI development and deployment in the United States. 

The document aims to promote American leadership and competitiveness in the field of artificial intelligence.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.
summary: This policy, the Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026, deals with the potential environmental effects of artificial intelligence. It is focused on mitigating any negative effects that AI may have on the environment.

title: Sectoral AI Governance Act of 2026

summary: The Sectoral AI Governance Act of 2026 is a policy document aiming to regulate the development and use of artificial intelligence within different sectors. title: Algorithmic Accountability Act of 2025
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: The Algorithmic Accountability Act of 2025 aims to establish regulations and procedures for ensuring the fairness and transparency of AI systems. This policy focuses on holding AI developers accountable for the impact of their algorithms on society.

title: China AI Power Report Act

summary: The China AI Power Report Act is a policy document that sets guidelines and standards for the development and use of artificial intelligence in China. The specifics of the act are unclear, but the title suggests it aims to promote China's AI capabilities and power.

title: K–12 AI Literacy and Readiness Act of 2026

summary: The K–12 AI Literacy and Readiness Act of 2026 is a policy aimed to provide education for students in grades K-12 about artificial intelligence and prepare them for its impact. The goal of this act is to ensure students develop necessary skills to understand and interact safely with AI technology.

title: Preventing AI Censorship Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
summary: The Preventing AI Censorship Act is likely aimed at preventing artificial intelligence systems from censoring or filtering information. The exact details and goals of the act are unclear without more information.
